---
title: "Seminar Theme"
subtitle: "Plain, traditional, and low-drama"
author: Demo
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    embed-resources: true
    transition: none
---

## A more traditional slide look

This template is meant to feel closer to a standard academic slide deck:

- white background
- dark text
- minimal decoration
- straightforward transitions

## Good uses

- job talks
- workshop presentations
- methods lectures
- any talk where you want the content to do the work

## Example slide structure

### Main point

State the takeaway in one sentence, then support it with 3-4 bullets.

- Start with the result or claim
- Add the minimum necessary evidence
- Keep figures and tables clean
- Avoid unnecessary visual effects

## Example table

| Item | Why it works |
|------|--------------|
| White background | Familiar and easy to project |
| Dark text | High contrast |
| Minimal styling | Keeps attention on the argument |
| No transitions | Feels direct and professional |
